A face that moves between tradition and edge, stillness and fire.

Aloisrai is a versatile Indian model working across editorial, commercial, and traditional fashion. With a presence that adapts seamlessly — from high-fashion campaigns to heritage saree shoots — she brings a rare depth of expression to every frame.
